prompt: An aerial drone shot of an expansive, perfectly flat, vibrant green grassy plain stretching endlessly to a distant horizon. In the lower foreground, exactly two fluffy white sheep are standing and grazing. Bright, clear daylight casts sharp, dark shadows from the animals towards the left. Above the horizon is a clear, pale blue sky with a few faint, wispy clouds. The composition emphasizes the vast emptiness and scale of the landscape compared to the small animals.
